mapper.select: SELECT column_id AS id, dataset_id AS datasetId, column_name AS columnName, kind, alias, sort_order AS sortOrder FROM ib_dataset_column WHERE dataset_id = #{datasetId} ORDER BY sort_order, column_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ib_dataset_column (dataset_id, column_name, kind, alias, sort_order) VALUES (#{datasetId}, #{columnName}, #{kind}, #{alias}, #{sortOrder})
